summary: Admin Panel comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin panel features working correctly - dashboard, user management, job management, bookings, verifications, and reports.

issues: Login button click not working - need to press Enter to submit. This is a minor UX issue.

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB projection error in /api/admin/jobs - mixing inclusion and exclusion
Admin jobs endpoint using wrong field 'poster_id' instead of 'user_id'
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/status only returned message, not updated user
bugs_fixed.fix: Now returns full updated user object

bugs_fixed.issue: PUT /api/admin/jobs/{id}/status only returned message, not updated job
bugs_fixed.fix: Now returns full updated job object

critical_code_review_comments: Admin panel UI is well-structured with clear tabs and data display
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Dashboard stats are correctly aggregated from database
User management has proper View and Suspend/Activate actions
Job management has proper View and Remove actions
Verification review modal shows AI verification result correctly
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users and jobs created during backend pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel is fully functional. All tabs working: Dashboard (stats, charts, activity), Users (list, search, filter, view, suspend/activate), Jobs (list, search, filter, view, remove), Bookings (list, filter), Verifications (list, review with approve/reject), Reports (list). Admin access requires role='admin' or email in ADMIN_EMAILS list.
